content: Engineering staff in the US can work remotely up to 3 days a week and should be online during 10 AM to 3 PM EST.
Sales staff can expense customer travel and meals with manager approval.
Engineering staff in the EU receive a 450 EUR allowance for home office equipment and should align on local working hours.
Managers can approve home office exceptions above the standard stipend when accessibility or compliance requires it.
Support teams follow staggered shifts and do not use the standard remote-work core hours.
